meaning: n.暗讽(的话),影射(的话)vi.影射vt.旁敲侧击地表达,暗示
examples: The dialogue was all filth and innuendo.
The report was based on rumours, speculation, and innuendo.
Their chat and opinion programs spread innuendo daily.
The Information Age has run smack into the Innuendo Industry, and the Information Age has won.
Both men say they hope to wage a respectful contest, with no demonizing or Internet innuendo.
